Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>你知道該專案hook的修改方案B是?</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-30</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\provider\\\\tool-loop.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Tool Loop — iterative tool call execution for DirectProvider.\\n *\\n * Safety guards:\\n * 1. Iteration limit (default 25)\\n * 2. Repetition detection (same tool+args ≥3 times → break)\\n * 3. Parallel tool execution (Promise.all for multi-tool responses)\\n */\\nimport { createHash } from \\\"node:crypto\\\";\\nimport { existsSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport { resolve, dirname } from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport type { McpPool } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { enrichCodegraphResult } from \\\"./codegraph-enricher.js\\\";\\nimport { recordRichObservation } from \\\"../tool-observer.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types shared with adapters ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ChatMessage {\\n  role: \\\"system\\\" | \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\" | \\\"tool\\\";\\n  content: string | ContentBlock[];\\n  tool_call_id?: string;\\n  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ContentBlock {\\n  type: \\\"text\\\" | \\\"tool_use\\\" | \\\"tool_result\\\";\\n  text?: string;\\n  id?: string;\\n  name?: string;\\n  input?: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  tool_use_id?: string;\\n  content?: string;\\n  is_error?: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolCall {\\n  id: string;\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: { name: string; arguments: string };\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolDef {\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: {\\n    name: string;\\n    description?: string;\\n    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n/** Adapter must implement this to be used by the tool loop. */\\nexport interface LlmAdapter {\\n  chat(messages: ChatMessage[], opts: {\\n    tools?: ToolDef[];\\n    onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n    onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  }): Promise<{ message: ChatMessage; stopReason: string }>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Tool Loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  maxIterations?: number;\\n  /** Context window size — enables mid-loop overflow protection. */\\n  contextWindow?: number;\\n  /** Max chars per tool result (truncated if exceeded). Default: unlimited. */\\n  maxToolResultChars?: number;\\n  onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onToolStart?: (name: string, input: string) => void;\\n  onToolEnd?: (name: string, result: string, isError: boolean) => void;\\n  /**\\n   * 啟用 Tier B rich observation（僅 DirectProvider 注入；ACP 不經此 loop）。\\n   * precedingTools 不走此處——它由 runToolLoop loop-local 自給（F1/BC-1a）；\\n   * observe 只補 loop 內拿不到的 sessionId/chatId。\\n   */\\n  observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number };\\n}\\n\\nconst DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS = 25;\\nconst REPETITION_THRESHOLD = 3;\\nconst RTK_ENABLED = [\\\"true\\\", \\\"1\\\"].includes(process.env.RTK_SHELL_REWRITE ?? \\\"\\\");\\n\\nexport async function runToolLoop(\\n  adapter: LlmAdapter,\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  messages: ChatMessage[],\\n  tools: ToolDef[],\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions = {},\\n): Promise<{ stopReason: string }> {\\n  const maxIter = opts.maxIterations ?? DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS;\\n  const recentCalls: string[] = []; // hashes of recent tool calls\\n  // Tier B precedingTools 來源：loop-local 逐 iteration 累積的「發起序」工具名序列\\n  // （F1：DirectProvider 拿不到 session；不經 session、不經回呼）。\\n  const recentToolNames: string[] = [];\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxIter; i++) {\\n    // Mid-loop context overflow protection: if messages exceed 85% of context window, break early\\n    if (opts.contextWindow) {\\n      const currentTokens = estimateMessagesTokens(messages);\\n      if (currentTokens > opts.contextWindow * 0.85) {\\n        console.warn(`[tool-loop] context overflow guard: ${currentTokens} tokens > 85% of ${opts.contextWindow} — breaking at iteration ${i}`);\\n        messages.push({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: \\\"[System: Context budget nearly exhausted. Summarize progress and respond now.]\\\",\\n        });\\n        const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n        messages.push(final.message);\\n        return { stopReason: \\\"context_overflow\\\" };\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const { message, stopReason } = await adapter.chat(messages, {\\n      tools,\\n      onText: opts.onText,\\n      onThinking: opts.onThinking,\\n    });\\n\\n    messages.push(message);\\n\\n    // Extract tool calls (OpenAI format)\\n    const toolCalls = message.tool_calls;\\n    if (!toolCalls || toolCalls.length === 0) {\\n      return { stopReason };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Repetition detection\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n      const hash = hashToolCall(tc.function.name, tc.function.arguments);\\n      recentCalls.push(hash);\\n    }\\n    if (detectRepetition(recentCalls)) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: \\\"[System: Tool call loop detected — same call repeated multiple times. Please summarize your progress and respond to the user.]\\\",\\n      });\\n      // One more call without tools to get a text response\\n      const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n      messages.push(final.message);\\n      return { stopReason: \\\"tool_loop_break\\\" };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Execute tool calls (parallel for different servers, serial for same).\\n    // precedingSnapshot = 本 iteration 進入前的發起序（不含本輪 tool；同輪並行 tool 共享同一前綴）。\\n    const precedingSnapshot = [...recentToolNames];\\n    const results = await executeToolCalls(toolCalls, pool, opts, precedingSnapshot);\\n    // 本 iteration 實際發起的 tool 名追加進序列，供下一 iteration 當 preceding。\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name);\\n\\n    // Append tool results\\n    for (const r of results) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"tool\\\",\\n        tool_call_id: r.id,\\n        content: r.output,\\n      });\\n    }\\n\\n    // Project auto-detect: hint agent about CodeGraph index and AI.md\\n    const usedCodegraph = toolCalls.some(tc => tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\"));\\n    const { codegraph: cgProjects, aiMd: aiProjects } = detectProjectHints(toolCalls);\\n    const hints: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if (!usedCodegraph && cgProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = cgProjects.map(p => `\\\"${p}\\\"`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`CodeGraph index detected at ${paths}. Use codegraph_context/codegraph_impact instead of grep for call-chain analysis.`);\\n      for (const p of cgProjects) hintedCodegraph.add(p);\\n    }\\n    if (aiProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = aiProjects.map(p => `${p}/AI.md`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`AI.md found at ${paths} — read it for project conventions before making changes.`);\\n      for (const p of aiProjects) hintedAiMd.add(p);\\n    }\\n    if (hints.length > 0) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: `[System hint: ${hints.join(\\\" | \\\")}]`,\\n      });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Hit iteration limit\\n  messages.push({\\n    role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n    content: \\\"[System: Maximum tool call iterations reached. Please summarize your progress.]\\\",\\n  });\\n  const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n  messages.push(final.message);\\n  return { stopReason: \\\"max_iterations\\\" };\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction hashToolCall(name: string, args: string): string {\\n  return createHash(\\\"md5\\\").update(`${name}:${args}`).digest(\\\"hex\\\").slice(0, 12);\\n}\\n\\nfunction detectRepetition(recent: string[]): boolean {\\n  if (recent.length < REPETITION_THRESHOLD) return false;\\n  const last = recent[recent.length - 1];\\n  let count = 0;\\n  for (let i = recent.length - 1; i >= 0 && i >= recent.length - 5; i--) {\\n    if (recent[i] === last) count++;\\n  }\\n  return count >= REPETITION_THRESHOLD;\\n}\\n\\ninterface ToolResult {\\n  id: string;\\n  output: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Tier B rich observation 旁路。僅當 opts.observe 存在（= DirectProvider 注入）才寫。\\n * recordRichObservation 內部 fail-silent，故此處不需再包 try/catch。\\n */\\nfunction observeRich(\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n  name: string,\\n  args: Record<string, unknown>,\\n  output: string,\\n  isError: boolean,\\n  precedingTools: string[],\\n): void {\\n  if (!opts.observe) return;\\n  recordRichObservation({\\n    name,\\n    args,\\n    output,\\n    isError,\\n    precedingTools,\\n    sessionId: opts.observe.sessionId,\\n    chatId: opts.observe.chatId,\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nasync function executeToolCalls(\\n  toolCalls: ToolCall[],\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n  precedingTools: string[] = [],\\n): Promise<ToolResult[]> {\\n  const results: ToolResult[] = [];\\n  const maxChars = opts.maxToolResultChars;\\n\\n  // Group by server to serialize calls to the same server\\n  // but parallelize across different servers\\n  const tasks = toolCalls.map(async (tc) => {\\n    const name = tc.function.name;\\n    let args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    try {\\n      args = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments);\\n    } catch {\\n      args = {};\\n    }\\n\\n    // F5/BC-7：在 RTK rewrite 之前快照原始 args 供 observation（否則記到 \\\"rtk git status\\\"）。\\n    const origArgs = { ...args };\\n\\n    opts.onToolStart?.(name, tc.function.arguments);\\n\\n    // RTK auto-rewrite: prefix shell commands with `rtk` for compressed output\\n    if (RTK_ENABLED && name === \\\"shell\\\" && typeof args.command === \\\"string\\\") {\\n      args.command = applyRtkPrefix(args.command);\\n    }\\n\\n    try {\\n      const result = await pool.callTool(name, args);\\n\\n      // Codegraph enrichment: 附加 domain 資訊和 wiki 連結\\n      if (name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\")) {\\n        const projectPath = args.projectPath as string | undefined;\\n        enrichCodegraphResult(result, projectPath);\\n      }\\n\\n      let output = serializeToolResult(result.content);\\n      // Tier B rich observation（成功分支）。在「為 context 截斷」之前觀測——observer 自帶截斷。\\n      observeRich(opts, name, origArgs, output, !!result.isError, precedingTools);\\n      // Truncate tool output for context-constrained models\\n      if (maxChars && output.length > maxChars) {\\n        output = output.slice(0, maxChars) + `\\\\n...[truncated, ${output.length - maxChars} chars omitted]`;\\n      }\\n      opts.onToolEnd?.(name, output.slice(0, 200), !!result.isError);\\n      return { id: tc.id, output };\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      const errMsg = `Error executing ${name}: ${(err as Error).message}`;\\n      // 致命#4：失敗 tool 也寫 rich（最有萃取價值的失敗模式），否則 Direct 失敗 tool seq/rich 雙漏。\\n      observeRich(opts, name, origArgs, errMsg, true, precedingTools);\\n      opts.onToolEnd?.(name, errMsg, true);\\n      return { id: tc.id, output: errMsg };\\n    }\\n  });\\n\\n  // Execute all in parallel (MCP SDK handles its own serialization per-connection)\\n  const settled = await Promise.all(tasks);\\n  results.push(...settled);\\n  return results;\\n}\\n\\nfunction serializeToolResult(content: unknown[]): string {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(content)) return String(content);\\n  return content\\n    .map((block: any) => {\\n      if (block.type === \\\"text\\\") return block.text;\\n      return JSON.stringify(block);\\n    })\\n    .join(\\\"\\\\n\\\");\\n}\\n\\n\\n/** Prefix eligible shell commands with `rtk` for compressed output. Skip interactive/piped commands. */\\nfunction applyRtkPrefix(cmd: string): string {\\n  const trimmed = cmd.trimStart();\\n  // Already has rtk prefix\\n  if (trimmed.startsWith(\\\"rtk \\\")) return cmd;\\n  // Skip: piped chains, interactive commands, redirections\\n  if (/[|><]/.test(cmd)) return cmd;\\n  // Only rewrite known rtk-friendly commands\\n  const rtkCmds = [\\\"git status\\\", \\\"git diff\\\", \\\"git log\\\", \\\"grep \\\", \\\"cargo test\\\", \\\"npm test\\\", \\\"npx tsc\\\"];\\n  if (rtkCmds.some((c) => trimmed.startsWith(c))) {\\n    return `rtk ${trimmed}`;\\n  }\\n  return cmd;\\n}\\n\\n/** Rough token estimate for mid-loop overflow check. */\\nfunction estimateMessagesTokens(messages: ChatMessage[]): number {\\n  let chars = 0;\\n  for (const m of messages) {\\n    const c = m.content;\\n    chars += (typeof c === \\\"string\\\" ? c.length : JSON.stringify(c ?? \\\"\\\").length) + 10;\\n  }\\n  return Math.ceil(chars / 4);\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Project auto-detect hints (CodeGraph + AI.md) ─────────────────────────\\n\\n/** Projects where we already emitted a hint this loop (avoid spamming). */\\nconst hintedCodegraph = new Set<string>();\\nconst hintedAiMd = new Set<string>();\\n\\n/**\\n * Extract project root paths from tool call args (read/grep/glob paths).\\n * Walk up to 3 levels from the path to find .codegraph/ or AI.md.\\n */\\nfunction detectProjectHints(toolCalls: ToolCall[]): { codegraph: string[]; aiMd: string[] } {\\n  const cgFound: string[] = [];\\n  const aiFound: string[] = [];\\n\\n  for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n    if (tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\")) continue;\\n\\n    let args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    try { args = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments); } catch { continue; }\\n\\n    const candidates: string[] = [];\\n    if (typeof args.path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(args.path);\\n    if (typeof args.file_path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(args.file_path);\\n    if (typeof args.pattern === \\\"string\\\" && /^[A-Z]:[/\\\\\\\\]/.test(args.pattern)) candidates.push(args.pattern);\\n    if (Array.isArray(args.operations)) {\\n      for (const op of args.operations as any[]) {\\n        if (typeof op?.path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(op.path);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    for (const p of candidates) {\\n      let dir = resolve(p.replace(/\\\\//g, \\\"\\\\\\\\\\\"));\\n      if (/\\\\.\\\\w+$/.test(dir)) dir = dirname(dir);\\n      for (let depth = 0; depth < 4; depth++) {\\n        const normalized = dir.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\");\\n        if (!hintedCodegraph.has(normalized) && existsSync(resolve(dir, \\\".codegraph\\\"))) {\\n          cgFound.push(normalized);\\n        }\\n        if (!hintedAiMd.has(normalized) && existsSync(resolve(dir, \\\"AI.md\\\"))) {\\n          aiFound.push(normalized);\\n        }\\n        // Stop walking if we found both at this level\\n        if (cgFound.includes(normalized) && aiFound.includes(normalized)) break;\\n        const parent = dirname(dir);\\n        if (parent === dir) break;\\n        dir = parent;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return { codegraph: [...new Set(cgFound)], aiMd: [...new Set(aiFound)] };\\n}\\n\\n/** Reset hints between sessions (call on session start). */\\nexport function resetCodegraphHints(): void {\\n  hintedCodegraph.clear();\\n  hintedAiMd.clear();\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":393,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":393}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\provider\\\\direct.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * DirectProvider — calls LLM APIs directly (no ACP subprocess).\\n * Manages its own MCP connections and tool loop.\\n */\\nimport { EventEmitter } from \\\"node:events\\\";\\nimport type { Provider, SessionUpdate, ProviderType } from \\\"./types.js\\\";\\nimport { McpPool, loadMcpConfigs, type ToolSchema } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { runToolLoop, type ChatMessage, type ToolDef } from \\\"./tool-loop.js\\\";\\nimport { compactIfNeeded } from \\\"./compaction.js\\\";\\nimport { detectLlamaCpp, localComplete } from \\\"../local-llm.js\\\";\\nimport { OpenAICompatAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/openai-compat.js\\\";\\nimport { OllamaNativeAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/ollama-native.js\\\";\\nimport { LlamaCppAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/llamacpp.js\\\";\\nimport { AnthropicAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/anthropic.js\\\";\\nimport type { LlmAdapter } from \\\"./tool-loop.js\\\";\\n\\nexport interface DirectProviderConfig {\\n  type: ProviderType;\\n  model: string;\\n  baseUrl: string;\\n  apiKey: string;\\n  /** System prompt (preamble). */\\n  systemPrompt?: string;\\n  /** Extra env vars passed to MCP server processes. */\\n  mcpEnv?: Record<string, string>;\\n  /** If set, only connect MCP servers whose names are in this list. */\\n  mcpServerFilter?: string[];\\n}\\n\\nexport class DirectProvider extends EventEmitter implements Provider {\\n  readonly name: string;\\n  private pool = new McpPool();\\n  private adapter: LlmAdapter;\\n  private messages: ChatMessage[] = [];\\n  private tools: ToolDef[] = [];\\n  private _closed = false;\\n  private _inflight = false;\\n  private contextWindow: number;\\n  /** 穩定 session 識別，供 Tier B observation（F1：prompt() 拿不到 session 物件）。 */\\n  private _sessionId = \\\"\\\";\\n\\n  constructor(private cfg: DirectProviderConfig) {\\n    super();\\n    this.name = cfg.type;\\n    this.adapter = this.createAdapter();\\n    this.contextWindow = resolveContextWindow(cfg.type, cfg.model);\\n  }\\n\\n  private createAdapter(): LlmAdapter {\\n    if (this.cfg.type === \\\"anthropic\\\") {\\n      return new AnthropicAdapter({\\n        apiKey: this.cfg.apiKey,\\n        model: this.cfg.model,\\n        baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl || undefined,\\n      });\\n    }\\n    if (this.cfg.type === \\\"local\\\") {\\n      const llamaCppUrl = process.env.LLAMACPP_URL?.trim();\\n      if (llamaCppUrl) {\\n        // llama.cpp server: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions with <think> tag parsing\\n        console.log(`[direct] using llama.cpp server at ${llamaCppUrl}`);\\n        return new LlamaCppAdapter({ baseUrl: llamaCppUrl, model: this.cfg.model, timeoutMs: 300_000, contextWindow: this.contextWindow });\\n      }\\n      return new OllamaNativeAdapter({\\n        baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl.replace(/\\\\/v1$/, \\\"\\\"), // strip /v1 suffix\\n        model: this.cfg.model,\\n        numCtx: Number(process.env.LOCAL_NUM_CTX) || 32768,\\n      });\\n    }\\n    return new OpenAICompatAdapter({\\n      baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl,\\n      apiKey: this.cfg.apiKey,\\n      model: this.cfg.model,\\n      numCtx: undefined,\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Initialize MCP connections and prepare tool schemas. }\\n  return count >= REPETITION_THRESHOLD;\\n}\\n\\ninterface ToolResult {\\n  id: string;\\n  output: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Tier B rich observation 旁路。僅當 opts.observe 存在（= DirectProvider args = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments);\\n    } catch {\\n      args = {};\\n    }\\n\\n    // F5/BC-7：在 RTK rewrite 之前快照原始 args 供 observation（否則記到 \\\"rtk git status\\\"）。\\n    const origArgs = { return block.text;\\n      return JSON.stringify(block);\\n    })\\n    .join(\\\"\\\\n\\\");\\n}\\n\\n\\n/** Prefix eligible shell commands with `rtk` for compressed output. You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

b.precedingTools.includes(\\\"toolA\\\") &&\\n      b.precedingToolsSemantics === \\\"exec-order\\\") {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-1a rich precedingTools reflect exec-order (toolA precedes toolB)\\\");\\n  } Parallel tool execution (Promise.all for multi-tool responses)\\n */\\nimport { createHash } from \\\"node:crypto\\\";\\nimport { existsSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport { resolve, dirname } from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport type { McpPool } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { enrichCodegraphResult } from \\\"./codegraph-enricher.js\\\";\\nimport { recordRichObservation } from \\\"../tool-observer.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types shared with adapters ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ChatMessage {\\n  role: \\\"system\\\" | \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\" | \\\"tool\\\";\\n  content: string | ContentBlock[];\\n  tool_call_id?: string;\\n  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ContentBlock {\\n  type: \\\"text\\\" | \\\"tool_use\\\" | \\\"tool_result\\\";\\n  text?: string;\\n  id?: string;\\n  name?: string;\\n  input?: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  tool_use_id?: string;\\n  content?: string;\\n  is_error?: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolCall {\\n  id: string;\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: { name: string; arguments: string };\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolDef {\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: {\\n    name: string;\\n    description?: string;\\n    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n/** Adapter must implement this to be used by the tool loop. */\\nexport interface LlmAdapter {\\n  chat(messages: ChatMessage[], opts: {\\n    tools?: ToolDef[];\\n    onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n    onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  }): Promise<{ message: ChatMessage; stopReason: string }>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Tool Loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  maxIterations?: number;\\n  /** Context window size — enables mid-loop overflow protection. */\\n  contextWindow?: number;\\n  /** Max chars per tool result (truncated if exceeded). DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS;\\n  const recentCalls: string[] = []; // hashes of recent tool calls\\n  // Tier B precedingTools 來源：loop-local 逐 iteration 累積的「發起序」工具名序列\\n  // （F1：DirectProvider 拿不到 session；不經 session、不經回呼）。\\n  const recentToolNames: string[] = [];\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxIter; i++) {\\n    // Mid-loop context overflow protection: if messages exceed 85% of context window, break early\\n    if (opts.contextWindow) {\\n      const currentTokens = estimateMessagesTokens(messages);\\n      if (currentTokens > opts.contextWindow * 0.85) {\\n        console.warn(`[tool-loop] context overflow guard: ${currentTokens} tokens > 85% of ${opts.contextWindow} — breaking at iteration ${i}`);\\n        messages.push({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: \\\"[System: Context budget nearly exhausted. Summarize progress and respond now.]\\\",\\n        });\\n        const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n        messages.push(final.message);\\n        return { stopReason: \\\"context_overflow\\\" };\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const { message, stopReason } = await adapter.chat(messages, {\\n      tools,\\n      onText: opts.onText,\\n      onThinking: opts.onThinking,\\n    });\\n\\n    messages.push(message);\\n\\n    // Extract tool calls (OpenAI format)\\n    const toolCalls = message.tool_calls;\\n    if (!toolCalls || toolCalls.length === 0) {\\n      return { stopReason };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Repetition detection\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n      const hash = hashToolCall(tc.function.name, tc.function.arguments);\\n      recentCalls.push(hash);\\n    }\\n    if (detectRepetition(recentCalls)) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: \\\"[System: Tool call loop detected — same call repeated multiple times. Please summarize your progress and respond to the user.]\\\",\\n      });\\n      // One more call without tools to get a text response\\n      const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n      messages.push(final.message);\\n      return { stopReason: \\\"tool_loop_break\\\" };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Execute tool calls (parallel for different servers, serial for same).\\n    // precedingSnapshot = 本 iteration 進入前的發起序（不含本輪 tool；同輪並行 tool 共享同一前綴）。\\n    const precedingSnapshot = [...recentToolNames];\\n    const results = await executeToolCalls(toolCalls, pool, opts, precedingSnapshot);\\n    // 本 iteration 實際發起的 tool 名追加進序列，供下一 iteration 當 preceding。\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name);\\n\\n    // Append tool results\\n    for (const r of results) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"tool\\\",\\n        tool_call_id: r.id,\\n        content: r.output,\\n      });\\n    }\\n\\n    // Project auto-detect: hint agent about CodeGraph index and AI.md\\n    const usedCodegraph = toolCalls.some(tc => tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\"));\\n    const { codegraph: cgProjects, aiMd: aiProjects } = detectProjectHints(toolCalls);\\n    const hints: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if (!usedCodegraph && cgProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = cgProjects.map(p => `\\\"${p}\\\"`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`CodeGraph index detected at ${paths}. Please summarize your progress.]\\\",\\n  });\\n  const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n  messages.push(final.message);\\n  return { stopReason: \\\"max_iterations\\\" };\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction hashToolCall(name: string, args: string): string {\\n  return createHash(\\\"md5\\\").update(`${name}:${args}`).digest(\\\"hex\\\").slice(0, 12);\\n}\\n\\nfunction detectRepetition(recent: string[]): boolean {\\n  if (recent.length < REPETITION_THRESHOLD) return false;\\n  const last = recent[recent.length - 1];\\n  let count = 0;\\n  for (let i = recent.length - 1; i >= 0 && i >= recent.length - 5; i--) {\\n    if (recent[i] === last) count++;\\n  }\\n  return count >= REPETITION_THRESHOLD;\\n}\\n\\ninterface ToolResult {\\n  id: string;\\n  output: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Tier B rich observation 旁路。僅當 opts.observe 存在（= DirectProvider 注入）才寫。\\n * recordRichObservation 內部 fail-silent，故此處不需再包 try/catch。\\n */\\nfunction observeRich(\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n  name: string,\\n  args: Record<string, unknown>,\\n  output: string,\\n  isError: boolean,\\n  precedingTools: string[],\\n): void {\\n  if (!opts.observe) return;\\n  recordRichObservation({\\n    name,\\n    args,\\n    output,\\n    isError,\\n    precedingTools,\\n    sessionId: opts.observe.sessionId,\\n    chatId: opts.observe.chatId,\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nasync function executeToolCalls(\\n  toolCalls: ToolCall[],\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n  precedingTools: string[] = [],\\n): Promise<ToolResult[]> {\\n  const results: ToolResult[] = [];\\n  const maxChars = opts.maxToolResultChars;\\n\\n  // Group by server to serialize calls to the same server\\n  // but parallelize across different servers\\n  const tasks = toolCalls.map(async (tc) => {\\n    const name = tc.function.name;\\n    let args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    try {\\n Default: unlimited. */\\n  maxToolResultChars?: number;\\n  onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onToolStart?: (name: string, input: string) => void;\\n  onToolEnd?: (name: string, result: string, isError: boolean) => void;\\n  /**\\n   * 啟用 Tier B rich observation（僅 DirectProvider 注入；ACP 不經此 loop）。\\n   * precedingTools 不走此處——它由 runToolLoop loop-local 自給（F1/BC-1a）；\\n   * observe 只補 loop 內拿不到的 sessionId/chatId。\\n   */\\n  observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number };\\n}\\n\\nconst DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS = 25;\\nconst REPETITION_THRESHOLD = 3;\\nconst RTK_ENABLED = [\\\"true\\\", \\\"1\\\"].includes(process.env.RTK_SHELL_REWRITE ?? \\\"\\\");\\n\\nexport async function runToolLoop(\\n  adapter: LlmAdapter,\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  messages: ChatMessage[],\\n  tools: ToolDef[],\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions = {},\\n): Promise<{ stopReason: string }> {\\n  const maxIter = opts.maxIterations ?? DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS;\\n  const recentCalls: string[] = []; // hashes of recent tool calls\\n  // Tier B precedingTools 來源：loop-local 逐 iteration 累積的「發起序」工具名序列\\n  // （F1：DirectProvider 拿不到 session；不經 session、不經回呼）。\\n  const recentToolNames: string[] = [];\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxIter; i++) {\\n    // Mid-loop context overflow protection: if messages exceed 85% of context window, break early\\n    if (opts.contextWindow) {\\n      const currentTokens = estimateMessagesTokens(messages);\\n      if (currentTokens > opts.contextWindow * 0.85) {\\n        console.warn(`[tool-loop] context overflow guard: ${currentTokens} tokens > 85% of ${opts.contextWindow} — breaking at iteration ${i}`);\\n        messages.push({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: \\\"[System: Context budget nearly exhausted. Please summarize your progress.]\\\",\\n  });\\n  const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n  messages.push(final.message);\\n  return { stopReason: \\\"max_iterations\\\" };\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction hashToolCall(name: string, args: string): string {\\n  return createHash(\\\"md5\\\").update(`${name}:${args}`).digest(\\\"hex\\\").slice(0, 12);\\n}\\n\\nfunction detectRepetition(recent: string[]): boolean {\\n  if (recent.length < REPETITION_THRESHOLD) return false;\\n  const last = recent[recent.length - 1];\\n  let count = 0;\\n  for (let i = recent.length - 1; i >= 0 && i >= recent.length - 5; i--) {\\n    if (recent[i] === last) count++;\\n  }\\n  return count >= REPETITION_THRESHOLD;\\n}\\n\\ninterface ToolResult {\\n  id: string;\\n  output: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Tier B rich observation 旁路。僅當 opts.observe 存在（= DirectProvider 注入）才寫。\\n * recordRichObservation 內部 fail-silent，故此處不需再包 try/catch。\\n */\\nfunction observeRich(\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n  name: string,\\n  args: Record<string, unknown>,\\n  output: string,\\n  isError: boolean,\\n  precedingTools: string[],\\n): void {\\n  if (!opts.observe) return;\\n  recordRichObservation({\\n    name,\\n    args,\\n    output,\\n    isError,\\n    precedingTools,\\n    sessionId: opts.observe.sessionId,\\n    chatId: opts.observe.chatId,\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nasync function executeToolCalls(\\n  toolCalls: ToolCall[],\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n });\\nmkdirSync(OBS_DIR, { recursive: true });\\nconst OBS_PATH = join(OBS_DIR, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\");\\nprocess.env.BRIDGE_OBSERVATIONS_PATH = OBS_PATH;\\n\\nconst { redactArgs, => { results.push({ n, pass: false, d }); console.error(`[FAIL] ${n}: ${d}`); };\\n\\nfunction resetObs() { writeFileSync(OBS_PATH, \\\"\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\"); }\\nfunction readObs() {\\n  if (!existsSync(OBS_PATH)) return [];\\n  return readFileSync(OBS_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\").trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean).map((l) => JSON.parse(l));\\n}\\n\\nconst tc = (name, args = \\\"{}\\\") => ({ id: `${name}-id`, type: \\\"function\\\", function: { name, arguments: args } });\\n\\n// mock LlmAdapter：依 script 逐 iteration 回 tool_calls，最後回無 tool_calls 收尾。\\nfunction mockAdapter(script) {\\n  let i = 0;\\n  return {\\n    async chat() {\\n      const step = script[i++];\\n      if (!step || step.stop) return { message: { role: \\\"assistant\\\", content: \\\"done\\\" }, stopReason: \\\"stop\\\" };\\n      return { message: { role: \\\"assistant\\\", content: \\\"\\\", tool_calls: step.tool_calls }, stopReason: \\\"tool_calls\\\" };\\n    },\\n  };\\n}\\nconst mockPool = { async callTool(name) { return { content: [{ type: \\\"text\\\", text: `out:${name}` }], isError: false }; } };\\n\\n// ── BC-6：redactArgs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n  const r = redactArgs({ command: \\\"ls /home/user\\\", apiKey: \\\"sk-xxx\\\", token: \\\"abc\\\", authorization: \\\"Bearer y\\\" });\\n  if (r.apiKey === \\\"[REDACTED]\\\" && r.token === \\\"[REDACTED]\\\" && r.authorization === \\\"[REDACTED]\\\" && r.command === \\\"ls /home/user\\\") {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-6 key-name blacklist redacts secrets, keeps path\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-6 key-name blacklist\\\", JSON.stringify(r));\\n\\n  const r2 = redactArgs({ command: \\\"curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-live-123' https://x\\\" });\\n  if (typeof r2.command === \\\"string\\\" && r2.command.includes(\\\"[REDACTED]\\\") && !r2.command.includes(\\\"sk-live-123\\\")) {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-6 shell command value-level scrub\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-6 shell scrub\\\", JSON.stringify(r2));\\n}\\n\\n// ── BC-5：fail-silent（寫入失敗不拋）─────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n  const good = process.env.BRIDGE_OBSERVATIONS_PATH;\\n  // 指向一個「目錄」當檔案路徑 → appendFileSync 應 EISDIR；observer 必須吞掉。\\n  process.env.BRIDGE_OBSERVATIONS_PATH = OBS_DIR;\\n  let threw = false;\\n  try {\\n    const ret = recordSeqObservation({ name: \\\"x\\\", status: \\\"completed\\\", sessionId: \\\"s\\\", precedingTools: [] });\\n    if (ret !== undefined) threw = true; // 應回 void\\n  } catch { threw = true; }\\n  process.env.BRIDGE_OBSERVATIONS_PATH = good;\\n  if (!threw) ok(\\\"BC-5 fail-silent: write error neither throws nor returns value\\\");\\n  else fail(\\\"BC-5 fail-silent\\\", \\\"recordSeqObservation threw or returned non-void on bad path\\\");\\n}\\n\\n// ── BC-1a：Tier B precedingTools = loop-local 發起序（非進 loop 前快照）──────────\\n{\\n  resetObs();\\n  const messages = [];\\n  await runToolLoop(\\n    mockAdapter([{ tool_calls: [tc(\\\"toolA\\\")] }, { tool_calls: [tc(\\\"toolB\\\")] }, { stop: true }]),\\n    mockPool, messages, [], { observe: { sessionId: \\\"bc1a\\\" } },\\n  );\\n  const obs = readObs();\\n  const a = obs.find((o) => o.name === \\\"toolA\\\");\\n  const b = obs.find((o) => o.name === \\\"toolB\\\");\\n  if (a && b && a.source === \\\"rich\\\" && b.source === \\\"rich\\\" &&\\n      a.precedingTools.length === 0 &&\\n      b.precedingTools.includes(\\\"toolA\\\") &&\\n      b.precedingToolsSemantics === \\\"exec-order\\\") {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-1a rich precedingTools reflect exec-order (toolA precedes toolB)\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-1a exec-order precedingTools\\\", JSON.stringify(obs));\\n}\\n\\n// ── BC-7：rich 記 RTK rewrite 前的原始 args.command ─────────────────────────\\n{\\n  resetObs();\\n  const messages = [];\\n  await runToolLoop(\\n    mockAdapter([{ tool_calls: [tc(\\\"shell\\\", JSON.stringify({ command: \\\"git status\\\" }))] }, { stop: true }]),\\n    mockPool, messages, [], { observe: { sessionId: \\\"bc7\\\" } },\\n  );\\n  const obs = readObs();\\n  const shell = obs.find((o) => o.name === \\\"shell\\\");\\n  if (shell && shell.args && shell.args.command === \\\"git status\\\") {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-7 rich records pre-RTK original command (not 'rtk git status')\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-7 pre-RTK snapshot\\\", JSON.stringify(obs));\\n}\\n\\n// ── BC-2：seq schema（completion-order-approx、無 args/output）────────────────\\n{\\n  resetObs();\\n  recordSeqObservation({ name: \\\"grep\\\", status: \\\"completed\\\", sessionId: \\\"acp1\\\", chatId: 5, precedingTools: [\\\"glob\\\"] });\\n  const obs = readObs();\\n  const o = obs[0];\\n  if (obs.length === 1 && o.source === \\\"seq\\\" && o.name === \\\"grep\\\" && o.status === \\\"completed\\\" &&\\n      o.precedingToolsSemantics === \\\"completion-order-approx\\\" &&\\n      o.args === undefined && o.output === undefined && o.isError === undefined) {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-2 seq observation: completion-order-approx, no args/output\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-2 seq schema\\\", JSON.stringify(obs));\\n}\\n\\n// ── BC-8：跨 turn 不污染 combo（turn marker 介於兩 turn 工具名之間）────────────\\n{\\n  // 模擬 sessionManager 對 _recentToolNames 的維護：tool_call push、resetTurn push marker。\\n  let recent = [];\\n  recent = appendToolName(recent, \\\"toolA\\\");          // turn1 tool\\n  if (recent.length) recent = appendToolName(recent, TURN_MARKER); // resetTurn（不清空）\\n  recent = appendToolName(recent, \\\"toolB\\\");          // turn2 tool\\n  const iA = recent.indexOf(\\\"toolA\\\");\\n  const iM = recent.indexOf(TURN_MARKER);\\n  const iB = recent.indexOf(\\\"toolB\\\");\\n  if (iA >= 0 && iM > iA && iB > iM) {\\n    ok(\\\"BC-8 turn marker separates cross-turn tools (toolA < TURN < toolB)\\\");\\n  } else fail(\\\"BC-8 turn marker\\\", JSON.stringify(recent));\\n}\\n\\n// ── 收尾 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nrmSync(OBS_DIR, { recursive: true, force: true });\\nconst failed = results.filter((r) => !r.pass);\\nconsole.log(`\\\\n${results.length - failed.length}/${results.length} passed`);\\nprocess.exit(failed.length ? 1 : content.thinking:
The user is asking about "該專案hook的修改方案B" (the project hook modification plan B) in Chinese.

Looking at the observations, I can see the primary session is reading multiple files related to:
1. `tool-loop.ts` - Tool loop implementation with observation hooks
2. `direct.ts` - DirectProvider implementation  
3. `sessionManager.ts` - Session management with tool observation hooks
4. `check-tool-observer.mjs` - A test script for tool observer functionality

From the code, I can see there are two approaches (tiers) for tool observation being discussed:
- **Tier A (方案A)**: Sequential observation via `recordSeqObservation` in `sessionManager.ts` for ACP provider path
- **Tier B (方案B)**: Rich observation via `recordRichObservation` in `tool-loop.ts` for DirectProvider path

The code shows comments in Chinese that explain:
- BC-1: Direct路徑只用rich不用seq (DirectProvider only uses rich, not seq)
- BC-1a: Tier B precedingTools = loop-local發起序 (Tier B precedingTools use loop-local execution order)
- F1/BC-1a: DirectProvider拿不到session，不經session、不經回呼 (DirectProvider can't access session, doesn't go through session callbacks)

So **方案B (Plan B)** appears to be the **Tier B rich observation approach** used in the `tool-loop.ts` for DirectProvider, where:
1. Rich observations are recorded with full args/output
2. precedingTools are maintained loop-locally (not via session)
3. Observations are injected via `opts.observe` passed from DirectProvider to runToolLoop
4. Original args are captured before RTK rewrite (BC-7)

This is the alternative to the Tier A approach which uses lightweight seq observations in sessionManager for ACP provider.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Project hook modification Plan B: Tier B rich observation for DirectProvider</title>
  <subtitle>Plan B uses loop-local rich observations in tool-loop.ts for DirectProvider path with full args/output capture</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Plan B is the Tier B rich observation approach implemented in src/provider/tool-loop.ts for DirectProvider</fact>
    <fact>DirectProvider injects observe option {sessionId, chatId} into runToolLoop to enable rich observation recording</fact>
    <fact>Tier B precedingTools are maintained loop-locally via recentToolNames array instead of via session callbacks</fact>
    <fact>observeRich function records full tool execution details including name, args, output, isError, and precedingTools with exec-order semantics</fact>
    <fact>Original args are captured before RTK shell command rewrite to preserve actual user input (BC-7)</fact>
    <fact>Rich observations are written for both successful and failed tool calls to capture valuable failure patterns</fact>
    <fact>Plan B contrasts with Plan A (Tier A) which uses lightweight seq observations in sessionManager.ts for ACP provider path</fact>
    <fact>BC-1 guards ensure DirectProvider uses only rich observations while ACP provider uses only seq observations to avoid double-recording</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The project implements two parallel observation strategies for tool usage tracking. Plan B (Tier B) is the rich observation approach specifically designed for the DirectProvider code path. Since DirectProvider manages its own tool loop without going through the ACP subprocess and session callbacks, it requires a different hook architecture. The implementation injects an observe option containing sessionId and optional chatId from DirectProvider.prompt() into runToolLoop(). Inside the tool loop, precedingTools are maintained via a loop-local recentToolNames array that accumulates tool names across iterations in execution order. The observeRich() function is called within executeToolCalls() for both successful and failed tools, recording complete execution details including the original args (captured before RTK shell command rewrites), output, error status, and the exec-order precedingTools sequence. This approach provides richer data for analysis compared to Plan A's lightweight completion-order seq observations used for ACP, with explicit guards (activeProvider === "acp" checks) preventing double-recording when both paths are available.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>

    <file>src/provider/direct.ts</file>
    <file>src/sessionManager.ts</file>
    <file>scripts/check-tool-observer.mjs</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

接線、\\nobservations rotate（Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底，見 §取捨）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 2.1 `src/tool-observer.ts`（新檔 · 唯一寫入收斂點）\\n\\n職責：observation schema 組裝、脫敏、截斷、JSONL append、fail-silent 全吞。零業務邏輯外洩。\\n\\n匯出：\\n- `recordSeqObservation(input: SeqObservationInput): void` — Tier A。fire-and-forget。\\n- `recordRichObservation(input: RichObservationInput): void` — Tier B。fire-and-forget。\\n- `redactArgs(args: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown>` — 脫敏（export 供測試）。\\n- 型別 `Observation` / `SeqObservationInput` / `RichObservationInput`（export 供測試與 Phase 2）。\\n- `OBSERVATIONS_PATH` 常數（= `join(config.memoryDir, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\")`）。\\n\\n內部：\\n- `appendObservation(obs: Observation): void` — **整段 `try { ... appendFileSync ... } catch { console.error }`**\\n  包覆（涵蓋 schema 組裝 + 脫敏 + 同步寫入的所有拋錯，不只 `.catch`；修 skeptic「`.catch(()=>{})`\\n  對同步拋錯無效」）。沿用 `event-log.ts:56–67` 的 mkdirSync+appendFileSync 範式（F6）。\\n- **size cap**：append 前 `existsSync && statSync(path).size > OBS_MAX_BYTES`（建議 32 MB，常數可調）\\n  → 安靜跳過寫入（不滾動、不刪除，Phase 2 補 rotate）。修 skeptic「無界增長 + 不存在的 30 天滾動前提」。\\n- `truncate(s, OBS_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS)` — observer **自帶** hard cap（建議 8 KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 把洩漏合約化的缺陷）；\\n  殘留洩漏風險由「observations.jsonl 與 events.jsonl 同信任域、本機 memoryDir、未外傳」承擔。\\n\\n### 2.2 `src/provider/tool-loop.ts`（既有 · Tier B 埋點 + loop-local 序列）\\n\\n- `runToolLoop`（:77–176）內新增 loop-local `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"exec-order\\\", sessionId, chatId }`。\\n  - `precedingSnapshot` = `executeToolCalls` 進入時的 `recentToolNames` 副本（由新增 opts 欄位傳入，見下）。\\n- `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n  - 由 `direct.ts:121` 呼叫端注入 `observe`。**但** `direct.ts` 無 session（F1）→ sessionId 用\\n    DirectProvider 既有的 `this`-scope 值。**誠實邊界**：`prompt()` 內目前唯一可得的穩定識別是\\n    `initialize()` 回傳的 `direct-${Date.now()}`（:93），但它未存成欄位。\\n    **設計回應**：DirectProvider 新增 `private _sessionId = \\\"\\\"`，在 `initialize()`(:93) 賦值，\\n    `prompt()` 注入 `observe:{ sessionId: this._sessionId }`（chatId 在 Direct 不可得 → 省略，\\n    observer 以 optional 容錯）。此為 §因果鏈 C2 的連動點。\\n\\n### 2.3 `src/sessionManager.ts`（既有 · Tier A 埋點 + 新欄位 + resetTurn）\\n\\n- `ChatSession` 介面（:54–131）新增 `_recentToolNames?: string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 `recordSeqObservation({ source:\\\"seq\\\", name:toolName, status:\\\"completed\\\",\\n    sessionId:session.sessionId, chatId:session.chatId, precedingTools: session._recentToolNames ?? [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證 · 編號）\\n\\n> 標 `[testable]` 者 Phase 1 內須有自動化測試；`[deferred-Phase2]` 者本輪只在 schema 預留欄位、不實作邏輯。\\n\\n- **BC-1 [testable]**：同一 Direct（`activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"`）tool call 只產生 **1 筆**\\n  `source:\\\"rich\\\"` observation，Tier A 對該路徑**不**寫 seq。\\n  驗法：mock `activeProvider=\\\"anthropic\\\"`，跑一次 `executeToolCalls`（含一個成功 tool）+ 對應\\n  `tool_call_update completed`，斷言 `observations.jsonl` 只產生 **1 筆** `source:\\\"seq\\\"`\\n  observation（含 name/status/precedingTools，**無** args/output），且 `precedingToolsSemantics===\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"`。\\n  驗法：mock `activeProvider=\\\"acp\\\"` occurrences≥5 才 propose。Phase 1 不實作；\\n  僅確保每筆 observation 帶 `ts`+`sessionId`+`name` 供 Phase 2 聚合計數。\\n\\n- **BC-5 [framework-dependent][testable]**：observations 寫入失敗**不中斷** tool loop / session。\\n `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 因果鏈分析（既有連動點 · grep 呼叫者窮舉）\\n\\n### C1 — `sessionManager.applyUpdate`（Tier A 埋點）\\n- **根因**：兩路徑 tool 完成事件的天然匯流點，要在此就 ACP 路徑寫 seq observation。\\n- **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 optional\\n  → 不破壞既有 `onText/onThinking/onToolStart/onToolEnd` 呼叫（向後相容）。\\n- **DirectProvider 連動（F1 修正引入）**：新增 `private _sessionId`，賦值點 `initialize()`(:93)，\\n  讀取點 `prompt()`(:121)。`_sessionId` 在 initialize 前為 `\\\"\\\"`；prompt 一定在 initialize 後呼叫\\n  （SessionManager.create :252 先 await initialize 才 set session）→ 無空值風險。\\n- **隱性風險**：只讀不寫 `results`/`messages` → 對 messages 注入、CodeGraph enrichment(:229–232)\\n  的 truncation 語意**零影響**（印證去 mutate 野心）。`ToolResult` 介面(:194–197) 不動。\\n- **決策**：rich observation 在 try **與** catch 分支都寫（致命#4）；args 取 RTK 前原始副本（F5/BC-7）。\\n\\n### C3 — `ChatSession` 介面 + `resetTurn`（新欄位 `_recentToolNames`）\\n- **根因**：Tier A `precedingTools` 需純工具名序列，既有無此狀態（F8）。\\n- **呼叫者/讀寫點（grep 窮舉）**：\\n  - 宣告：`ChatSession`(:54–131) 新增 optional 欄位 → `create`(:198–226) 物件字面量不需改（undefined 容錯）。\\n  - **唯一 push 維護點**：`tool_call` case(:367 區段)。\\n  - **讀取點**：`tool_call_update` case(:383/:394，僅 ACP 分支)。\\n  - **turn 邊界**：`resetTurn`(:412–421) — **此處是致命#3 的因果鏈漏接點**，必須 push marker\\n    （不清空）。grep `resetTurn` 呼叫者確認其為每 turn 重置入口（被 run-prompt 在 turn 起始呼叫）。\\n- **決策**：採 marker 不清空（F9 理由）；push 僅一處（不重複計數）。\\n\\n### C4 — 既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",...)` / `getToolUsageStats`（零衝突確認）\\n- seq observation 寫**獨立** `observations.jsonl`，event-log 寫 `events.jsonl`（F7）。\\n  二者不同檔、不互相覆寫、不競態。Tier A 在 `logEvent` 之後執行，不取代它。\\n\\n### C5 — `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` / preamble（Phase 1 不觸碰確認）\\n- grep 確認本輪改動不 import/呼叫 `skill-suggest`、不產 `SKILL_PROPOSE` token、不 rebuild preamble\\n  → 不踩 `POLICIES/preamble-frozen-snapshot.md`。Phase 2 才接。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 取捨與風險\\n\\n### 取捨\\n1. **獨立 `observations.jsonl` vs 擴充 event-log**（需求#2）：選獨立檔。\\n   - 理由：rich schema（巢狀 args/output/precedingTools）與 event-log 扁平 `{type,payload}` 不合；\\n     Phase 2 可單獨 rotate observations 不污染 30 天 event 滾動。\\n   - 代價：另一份檔案的生命週期。**Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底**（§2.1），不接受「30 天可滾動」的不存在前提\\n     （修方案 2/3 把不存在的 rotate 當前提）。\\n2. **路徑分流去重（BC-1）vs analyzer 端 dedup**：選路徑分流（簡單、無共享狀態），\\n   正確性綁 `activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"` 判別——已 A 級驗證可靠（F3）。\\n   退路保留但 Phase 1 不啟用：schema 帶 `source`，若日後判別不可靠可改 analyzer 端 dedup。\\n3. **`precedingTools` loop-local（Tier B）vs session 欄位（Tier A）**：兩路徑來源不同。\\n   Tier B 走 runToolLoop loop-local（F1 強制如此，且順帶解陳舊快照問題）；\\n   Tier A 走 `session._recentToolNames`（ACP 無 loop 可借）。語意差異由 `precedingToolsSemantics` 標注。\\n4. **脫敏黑名單 + shell value-level regex**：best-effort，不合約化（§2.1 / BC-6）。\\n5. **output hard cap 自帶 8KB**：不借 undefined 的 `maxToolResultChars`（F5 風險）。需求未指定，設計選擇。\\n\\n### 風險（誠實評估）\\n- 🔴 **R-A：ACP 萃取天花板（需求#5 核心誠實評估）**。ACP 在 `tool_call_update`（完成事件）寫入，\\n  ACP 進程外並行跑 tool 時 update 到達序 = **完成序非發起序**，與 agent 真實意圖序列無關。\\n  ∴ Tier A 的 combo 訊號**先天受限**，`precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"` 已顯式標注\\n  讓 Phase 2 不把它當 exec-order 用（避免#003「正確放大錯前提」）。\\n  **價值定位**：「兩者都用」中 Tier A 價值偏低，主要價值在 Tier B rich。但埋點成本極低\\n  （1 行條件 + 1 個 ring buffer push + marker），且使用者明確要求兩路徑都做 → Phase 1 保留 Tier A 合理；\\n  若 Phase 2 證實 ACP seq 噪音過大，可降級為純佔位而不影響 Tier B。**沉沒成本可接受。**\\n- 🟡 **R-B：分期策略（需求#4）**。Phase 1 只養資料、Phase 2 才 analyzer，低風險先行**合理**。\\n  殘留風險：schema 寫死後 Phase 2 才發現欄位不足需 re-collect。緩解：schema 寧可多記\\n  （precedingTools/source/semantics/sessionId/ts/isError 齊備）。\\n  **強建議（採 skeptic 正確主張）**：Phase 1 落地前跑一個 ≤30 行純統計 throwaway 腳本，\\n  讀幾筆真實 observation 驗 schema 真能 cluster 出 ≥1 合理訊號，否則「養資料」可能養髒資料（違反 Q4）。\\n  此驗證**不阻塞** Phase 1 PR，但列為 Phase 2 開工前的 gate。\\n- 🟡 **R-C：脫敏殘留洩漏**。黑名單 + shell regex 擋不住所有內嵌 secret。\\n  承擔依據：本機 memoryDir、與 events.jsonl 同信任域、未外傳。Phase 2 analyzer 讀取前可再過濾。\\n- 🟢 **R-D：size cap 靜默丟資料**。超 32MB 後安靜跳過寫入 → 可能漏記。\\n  Phase 1 接受（observations 是「養資料」非關鍵路徑），Phase 2 補 rotate 取代 cap。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. 學習查詢結果（R-3 `OBSERVATIONS_PATH` 常數（= `join(config.memoryDir, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\")`）。\\n\\n內部：\\n- `appendObservation(obs: Observation): void` — **整段 `try { ... appendFileSync ... } catch { console.error }`**\\n  包覆（涵蓋 schema 組裝 + 脫敏 + 同步寫入的所有拋錯，不只 `.catch`；修 skeptic「`.catch(()=>{})`\\n  對同步拋錯無效」）。沿用 `event-log.ts:56–67` 的 mkdirSync+appendFileSync 範式（F6）。\\n- **size cap**：append 前 `existsSync && statSync(path).size > OBS_MAX_BYTES`（建議 32 MB，常數可調）\\n  → 安靜跳過寫入（不滾動、不刪除，Phase 2 補 rotate）。修 skeptic「無界增長 + 不存在的 30 天滾動前提」。\\n- `truncate(s, OBS_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS)` — observer **自帶** hard cap（建議 8 KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n `direct-${Date.now()}`（:93），但它未存成欄位。\\n    **設計回應**：DirectProvider 新增 `private _sessionId = \\\"\\\"`，在 `initialize()`(:93) 賦值，\\n    `prompt()` 注入 `observe:{ sessionId: this._sessionId }`（chatId 在 Direct 不可得 → 省略，\\n    observer 以 optional 容錯）。此為 §因果鏈 C2 的連動點。\\n\\n### 2.3 `src/sessionManager.ts`（既有 · Tier A 埋點 + 新欄位 + resetTurn）\\n\\n- `ChatSession` 介面（:54–131）新增 `_recentToolNames?: string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證 · 編號）\\n\\n> 標 `[testable]` 者 Phase 1 內須有自動化測試；`[deferred-Phase2]` 者本輪只在 schema 預留欄位、不實作邏輯。\\n\\n- **BC-1 [testable]**：同一 Direct（`activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"`）tool call 只產生 **1 筆**\\n `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 因果鏈分析（既有連動點 · grep 呼叫者窮舉）\\n\\n### C1 — `sessionManager.applyUpdate`（Tier A 埋點）\\n- **根因**：兩路徑 tool 完成事件的天然匯流點，要在此就 ACP 路徑寫 seq observation。\\n- **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 optional\\n  → 不破壞既有 `onText/onThinking/onToolStart/onToolEnd` 呼叫（向後相容）。\\n- **DirectProvider 連動（F1 修正引入）**：新增 `private _sessionId`，賦值點 `initialize()`(:93)，\\n  讀取點 `prompt()`(:121)。`_sessionId` 在 initialize 前為 `\\\"\\\"`；prompt 一定在 initialize 後呼叫\\n  （SessionManager.create :252 先 await initialize 才 set session）→ 無空值風險。\\n- **隱性風險**：只讀不寫 `results`/`messages` → 對 messages 注入、CodeGraph enrichment(:229–232)\\n  的 truncation 語意**零影響**（印證去 mutate 野心）。`ToolResult` 介面(:194–197) 不動。\\n- **決策**：rich observation 在 try **與** catch 分支都寫（致命#4）；args 取 RTK 前原始副本（F5/BC-7）。\\n\\n### C3 — `ChatSession` 介面 + `resetTurn`（新欄位 `_recentToolNames`）\\n- **根因**：Tier A `precedingTools` 需純工具名序列，既有無此狀態（F8）。\\n- **呼叫者/讀寫點（grep 窮舉）**：\\n  - 宣告：`ChatSession`(:54–131) 新增 optional 欄位 → `create`(:198–226) 物件字面量不需改（undefined 容錯）。\\n  - **唯一 push 維護點**：`tool_call` case(:367 區段)。\\n  - **讀取點**：`tool_call_update` case(:383/:394，僅 ACP 分支)。\\n  - **turn 邊界**：`resetTurn`(:412–421) — **此處是致命#3 的因果鏈漏接點**，必須 push marker\\n    （不清空）。grep `resetTurn` 呼叫者確認其為每 turn 重置入口（被 run-prompt 在 turn 起始呼叫）。\\n- **決策**：採 marker 不清空（F9 理由）；push 僅一處（不重複計數）。\\n\\n### C4 — 既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",...)` / `getToolUsageStats`（零衝突確認）\\n- seq observation 寫**獨立** `observations.jsonl`，event-log 寫 `events.jsonl`（F7）。\\n  二者不同檔、不互相覆寫、不競態。Tier A 在 `logEvent` 之後執行，不取代它。\\n\\n### C5 — `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` / preamble（Phase 1 不觸碰確認）\\n- grep 確認本輪改動不 import/呼叫 `skill-suggest`、不產 `SKILL_PROPOSE` token、不 rebuild preamble\\n  → 不踩 `POLICIES/preamble-frozen-snapshot.md`。Phase 2 才接。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 取捨與風險\\n\\n### 取捨\\n1. **獨立 `observations.jsonl` vs 擴充 event-log**（需求#2）：選獨立檔。\\n   - 理由：rich schema（巢狀 args/output/precedingTools）與 event-log 扁平 `{type,payload}` 不合；\\n     Phase 2 可單獨 rotate observations 不污染 30 天 event 滾動。\\n   - 代價：另一份檔案的生命週期。**Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底**（§2.1），不接受「30 天可滾動」的不存在前提\\n     （修方案 2/3 把不存在的 rotate 當前提）。\\n2. **路徑分流去重（BC-1）vs analyzer 端 dedup**：選路徑分流（簡單、無共享狀態），\\n   正確性綁 `activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"` 判別——已 A 級驗證可靠（F3）。\\n   退路保留但 Phase 1 不啟用：schema 帶 `source`，若日後判別不可靠可改 analyzer 端 dedup。\\n3. **`precedingTools` loop-local（Tier B）vs session 欄位（Tier A）**：兩路徑來源不同。\\n   Tier B 走 runToolLoop loop-local（F1 強制如此，且順帶解陳舊快照問題）；\\n   Tier A 走 `session._recentToolNames`（ACP 無 loop 可借）。語意差異由 `precedingToolsSemantics` 標注。\\n4. **脫敏黑名單 + shell value-level regex**：best-effort，不合約化（§2.1 / BC-6）。\\n5. **output hard cap 自帶 8KB**：不借 undefined 的 `maxToolResultChars`（F5 風險）。需求未指定，設計選擇。\\n\\n### 風險（誠實評估）\\n- 🔴 **R-A：ACP 萃取天花板（需求#5 核心誠實評估）**。ACP 在 `tool_call_update`（完成事件）寫入，\\n  ACP 進程外並行跑 tool 時 update 到達序 = **完成序非發起序**，與 agent 真實意圖序列無關。\\n  ∴ Tier A 的 combo 訊號**先天受限**，`precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"` 已顯式標注\\n  讓 Phase 2 不把它當 exec-order 用（避免#003「正確放大錯前提」）。\\n  **價值定位**：「兩者都用」中 Tier A 價值偏低，主要價值在 Tier B rich。但埋點成本極低\\n  （1 行條件 + 1 個 ring buffer push + marker），且使用者明確要求兩路徑都做 → Phase 1 保留 Tier A 合理；\\n  若 Phase 2 證實 ACP seq 噪音過大，可降級為純佔位而不影響 Tier B。**沉沒成本可接受。**\\n- 🟡 **R-B：分期策略（需求#4）**。Phase 1 只養資料、Phase 2 才 analyzer，低風險先行**合理**。\\n  殘留風險：schema 寫死後 Phase 2 才發現欄位不足需 re-collect。緩解：schema 寧可多記\\n  （precedingTools/source/semantics/sessionId/ts/isError 齊備）。\\n  **強建議（採 skeptic 正確主張）**：Phase 1 落地前跑一個 ≤30 行純統計 throwaway 腳本，\\n  讀幾筆真實 observation 驗 schema 真能 cluster 出 ≥1 合理訊號，否則「養資料」可能養髒資料（違反 Q4）。\\n  此驗證**不阻塞** Phase 1 PR，但列為 Phase 2 開工前的 gate。\\n- 🟡 **R-C：脫敏殘留洩漏**。黑名單 + shell regex 擋不住所有內嵌 secret。\\n  承擔依據：本機 memoryDir、與 events.jsonl 同信任域、未外傳。Phase 2 analyzer 讀取前可再過濾。\\n- 🟢 **R-D：size cap 靜默丟資料**。超 32MB 後安靜跳過寫入 → 可能漏記。\\n  Phase 1 接受（observations 是「養資料」非關鍵路徑），Phase 2 補 rotate 取代 cap。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. 學習查詢結果（R-3 兩層教訓 · 必讀）\\n\\n讀 `.claudedocs/records/問題追蹤.md`「長期警惕模式」#001–#007：\\n\\n- **命中 #003 / #004 / #005（認知性·事實主張·共用值）**：本設計含「DirectProvider 拿不到 session」\\n  「activeProvider 可靠區分」等事實斷言 → 已在 §0 逐條附 A 級檔:行證據 + 反例檢查，\\n  未以架構直覺代替查碼（特別 F1 推翻了三案共有前提，正是 #003「單線索→事實」的反向防禦）。\\n- **命中 #007（self-review 盲點 · cross-source）**：本規格由 architect 綜合，承襲 judge-panel +\\n  skeptic 對抗驗證（cross-source），已對基底方案的 6 個致命缺陷逐一修正並標來源。\\n KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"exec-order\\\", sessionId, chatId }`。\\n  - `precedingSnapshot` = `executeToolCalls` 進入時的 `recentToolNames` 副本（由新增 opts 欄位傳入，見下）。\\n- `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n
